description:
OL 316 (REV. 2/2017)  WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Cruise autonomous vehicle (“Cruise AV”), operating in autonomous mode, was stopped at a red light on northbound Franklin Street at 
the intersection with Bay Street when a lane-splitting  motorcycle made contact with the Cruise AV’s front right articulating radar, 
damaging the cover. The motorcyclist did not stop. There were no injuries and police were not called.
Go to Page 3
